TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cilo'ohay, title = Cilo'ohay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cilo'ohay} }

S.FORM: alang Cilo'ohay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 102 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 43 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 59 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Paywan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cilo'ohay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Cilo'ohay hya' ga Tangahang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cilo'ohay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 102 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 43 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 59 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Paywan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cilo'ohay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cilo'ohay hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Cilo'ohay hya' ga Tangahang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj ħjaʔ ɣa taŋaħaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
